race.comment: SIR DINADAN (11) progressive gelding at his top for this third-up. Was a month between runs when he closed strongly for a most improved second over 1800m at Randwick. Can sit midfield with cover and prove hard to hold out. SARRISMO (10) on a three-run winning streak and will take control early with the 53kg. Defeated inferior opposition in grand style when winning the Orange Cup over 1600m with 61kg. Hard to stop in his toughest test to date. ROTAGILLA (9) talented gelding who can go quickly through the grades this prep. Sprinted quickly with the 53kg to get the job done over 1800m at Randwick in BM94 grade. Back in trip and can win a race of this calibre. DEPTH OF CHARACTER (3) gets a much better set-up second-up and has the potential to win a big race this time in. Out to his right trip with the key jockey change. Leading prospect. ZAMBARDO (1) Group 1 placegetter who strips fitter second-up out to the mile. Tricky gate and improvement is anticipated.
